name: Potato Soup (Prodigy)
recipeIngredient: 1 1/2 pounds Potatoes, peeled and roughly diced
recipeInstructions:
1. Remove the root end of the leeks, trim the dark green tops, and reserve for another use.
2. Slice the light part into 1/2-inch rounds, wash well, and set aside on a plate.
3. Heat the oil in a pot over medium heat and add the leeks. Cook, stirring, for 5 minutes.
4. Add stock, water, potatoes, nutmeg, salt, and pepper to the pot. Increase heat to high and bring to a boil.
5. Reduce heat to low and simmer, uncovered, for 30 minutes.
6. Remove from heat and puree the soup in batches using an immersion blender or transfer portions to a blender.
7. Place the pureed soup back into the pot and reheat, covered, over low heat until warmed through.
8. To serve, add a generous dollop of sour cream to each bowl and sprinkle with chopped chives.
9. Serve piping hot from the pot or reheat at the table if refrigerated.
10. Store leftover soup in an airtight container for up to 3 days, or freeze in 3-cup portions.
